name: Difficult Conversation
description: Navigate tough conversations with empathy and clarity

phases.name: Opening
phases.guidance: Lead with facts, not emotions. State the issue clearly and calmly.

phases.name: Active Listening
phases.guidance: Listen fully before responding. Reflect back what you heard.

phases.name: Emotional Escalation
phases.guidance: Acknowledge the emotion. Say: 'I understand this is frustrating.' Don't get defensive.

phases.name: Problem Solving
phases.guidance: Shift to solutions. Ask: What would a good outcome look like for both of us?

phases.name: Commitment
phases.guidance: Lock in specific next steps. Summarize what was agreed and by when.

outputFormat: 2-4 bullets on how to respond with empathy and clarity
